prestazioni: Engine swap to a Duramax 6.6L V8 (L5P) with a custom billet aluminum engine block (Golen Engines) supporting 1,200+ HP, paired with a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (88mm compressor wheel) and a custom BorgWarner EFR 9280 turbo for sequential compound setup, mated to a Tremec TR-9080 8-speed transmission with a Punch Powerglide torque converter (4,500+ stall speed).

Full custom fuel system featuring dual Bosch Motorsports 044 high-flow fuel pumps, 2,000cc ID1700x injectors, and a Radium Engineering surge tank with AN-10 lines, controlled by a Holley Dominator EFI ECU with custom L5P-specific tuning maps for E85 compatibility.

Chassis reinforcement via a custom 4130 chromoly roll cage (The Fab School) with integrated subframe connectors, paired with a KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilover kit (24-way rebound, 12-way compression) and Eibach ERS race springs (1,200 lb/in front, 1,500 lb/in rear) for extreme off-road articulation and on-road stability.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Liberty Walk LB Works H1 Alpha kit (carbon fiber fenders, extended rocker panels, and rear quarter panels) with integrated LED light bars (Baja Designs Squadron Pro) and a custom front bumper featuring a Warn Zeon 12-S winch and a carbon fiber skid plate (Rogue Fabrication).

Full custom interior with Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shells, 6-point Schroth harnesses), a custom aluminum dashboard (Racepak IQ3 digital dash), and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with a quick-release hub, all wrapped in Alcantara and custom stitching (Eagle Leather).

Exterior lighting overhaul with Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED headlights (DRL/low/high beam), Oracle Lighting RGB halo fog lights, and a custom rear light bar (Baja Designs XL80) integrated into a carbon fiber rear bumper with dual exhaust exits (Stainless Works 4-inch mandrel-bent system).
